immutable_core.semantic_definition: A time-stamped ICU urine-output measurement event in milliliters, preserving local urinary route provenance and excluding non-urine output, intake-output balance, and derived stay-level summaries.
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Any database asset published as std_icu_urine_output_event must preserve event-level ICU urine-output volume semantics rather than first-day summaries, urine-output rate, total output, or intake-output balance.

canonical_representation.range_role_note: The hard range is an opening single-event guardrail for approved standard values. Raw source volumes should be preserved separately when available.

external_alignment.alignment_policy: Use external terminologies as semantic anchors when reliable, but keep source-route inclusion and cleaning governed by this internal standard-variable contract.
external_alignment.public_anchor_status: urine-output observation concepts are used as anchors, but local route-specific source rows remain governed by database mapping specs

candidate_external_refs.note: Used by multiple Amsterdam urine-output route rows.
Used by Amsterdam nephrostomy urine-output route rows.

external_alignment.note: External anchors support semantic orientation but do not replace the internal cross-database source-route contract.

new_variable_trigger_examples: changing event-level urine output into first-day urine-output summary
changing urine output into urine-output rate per kg per hour
mixing total output, dialysis removal, drains, or intake-output balance into the same variable without a new identity
version_bump_trigger_examples: adding a reviewed database mapping while preserving event-level urine-output meaning
tightening hard-valid single-event range rules without changing the event-level urine-output concept

allowed_database_specific_variation: local source code systems and source codes
local urinary route labels and route flags
local structural identifiers normalized into subject_id, hadm_id, and stay_id roles
database-specific availability of irrigant input/output rows
disallowed_same_name_variation: publishing first-day urine-output total as std_icu_urine_output_event
including non-urine drains or total output events without a specific child contract
silently allowing implausible single-event values into the approved standard value without raw retention and cleaning flags

execution_governance.formal_output_rule: Formal std_icu_urine_output_event outputs should go through execution.py reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec. Execute-mode runtime evidence should record spec hashes and formal output-file signatures.
execution_governance.future_non_bypassable_rule: Formal std_icu_urine_output_event outputs should be generated only through the governed execution.py path reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec.
